title: centaurea debeauxii subsp. endressii
intro: Centaurea debeauxii subsp. endressii, also known as the Cornflower or Mountain Cornflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Centaurea debeauxii subsp. endressii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
